description: GrowthBook is a platform for feature flags, experimentation, and product analytics. It is available as GrowthBook Cloud and as a self-hosted/open-source deployment.
summary: GrowthBook exposes a REST API, a public read-only SDK Connection HTTP endpoint, an npm-installed CLI, and an npm-delivered MCP server; authenticated surfaces use GrowthBook-issued API keys, and the MCP server also accepts a GrowthBook PAT.
